hero.title: Kujoyina i-IATF
hero.lead: Kuba lilunga kuvuliwe. Kunetindlela letehlukene tekutibandzakanya, kungaba kutsi utsembele kutetheknoloji yekusita, kwakha luhlelo lolutfolakalako, kuhumusha, kuvivinya, noma kugcina iphrojekthi. Tinkhulumiswano netincumo tenteka emphakatsini ku GitHub naku Discord.

items: Cela umsebenti. Nangabe uhlangabetana nenkinga yekufinyeleleka lengacatululwa nguhlelo lolusemtsetfweni lolunemthombo lovulekile, tfumela sicelo ngekusebentisa luhlelo lwekungenisa ticelo.
Hlola uphindze ubuyekete. Yetama imiklamo ye-IATF ngelusito lwetheknoloji lolusebentisako, ubike kutsi yini lesebentako nalengasebenti, bese ufaka tinkinga ngalokucondzile kuloluhlaka lolufanele.
Yakha. Tfola tinkinga kunobe ngabe nguyiphi i-repository ye-IATF, tfumela ticelo tekukhipha, nobe wente umsebenti njengenjiniyela loneligunya.
Londvolota. Imiklamo levele ikhona ngalesinye sikhatsi idzinga umuntfu lomusha lotawenta lomsebenti.
I-GitHub. Tinkinga, ticelo tekukhishwa, kukhululwa, nemarekhodi emklamo.
Kungavumelani. Kucocisana lokuchubekako, kusebentisana, kanye nemibuto lengakahleleki.
Tfumela umlayeto nge-e-mail. Kusetjentiswa contact@iatf.cc uma i-GitHub nobe i-Discord tingahambisani.

header.title: Khetsa luhlelo loluhambisana nendlela lofuna kufaka ngayo ligalelo

paragraphs: Tonkhe tindlela tekusakata tifaka ekhatsi luhlolo lolusemtsetfweni lolufanako kanye netindzawo letifana naleti.
